title: Smoldering Fiery Ukrainian Onion Salt Skillet
description: A sour and energizing Ukrainian dish featuring the fiery flavors of onion salt, cooked with wok-hei in a molcajete.

ingredients.name: Onion Salt
ingredients.notes: preferably freshly grated from a rock salt block

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: minced, for flavor and digestive benefits

ingredients.name: Chili Pepper
ingredients.notes: such as habanero or similar variety, sliced for heat

ingredients.name: Mushroom
ingredients.notes: button or cremini, sliced for texture and umami

ingredients.name: Spinach
ingredients.notes: fresh, for nutritional benefits and flavor

instructions: Heat the molcajete over medium-high heat until it reaches a smoldering temperature.
Add the vegetable oil and swirl to coat the surface.
Add the minced garlic and chili pepper slices, and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushroom and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced onion salt, and toss to combine with the mushroom and garlic mixture.
Add the fresh spinach, and cook until wilted, about 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the lime juice, and season with salt to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional onion salt and chili pepper if desired.
